title: Office & Administration, Senior Specialist
description:
Our client, an international e-commerce logistics provider with a strong global footprint, is seeking an Office & Administration Senior Specialist to support their growing Singapore operations. In this position, you will oversee day-to-day office management across two locations, ensuring a well-run, safe, and positive workplace environment. You will also play a key role in driving employee engagement activities and providing executive administrative support to senior regional leaders based in Singapore.

About the Role

  • Oversee day-to-day office operations across two Singapore locations, including procurement, inventory, vendor management, maintenance coordination, and invoice processing.
  • Support office setup, relocations, facilities branding, and employee transportation arrangements.
  • Drive executive administrative support to senior leaders – calendar management, meetings coordination, travel booking, expense submission, and file management.
  • Uphold office policies, improve administrative processes, assist with HR-related tasks (eg. induction, interview scheduling), and ensure a smooth, efficient and positive workplace environment.
  • Drive employee engagement by planning and executing events, managing budgets, and producing communication materials.

About You

  • Diploma in Business Administration (equivalent) with 2+ years’ experience in administrative, secretarial, or office management roles.
  • Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities, work independently, and operate confidently in a fast-moving environment.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills for liaising with internal teams and external vendors.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite with basic accounting knowledge (AP/AR), facilities management exposure, and understanding or procurement processes.
  • Detail-oriented, adaptable, willing to learn.

postedCompany.description:
Liberte HR Services was established with the vision of creating a talent solutions business that truly embodies partnership with our clients.


Creating value is in the heart of what we do. We hope to deviate from a cookie-cutter approach to having meaningful dialogues with our clients and providing solutions in the following areas:


* Recruitment - Filling the roles you may not have the capacity or expertise to do so, across South-east Asia


* Advisory - Advising you on recruitment processes and workflow for your talent acquisition organization


* Coaching and Training - Coaching your hiring managers on interviews or even helping your new hire settle in and perform better in their roles


* Talent Solutions as a Service - Come speak to us about this innovative approach to managing your growth and scale up in talent resourcing in your organization.


With our sister company, Liberte Consulting, an award-winning HR outsourcing and consultancy firm, we strive to provide a one-stop solution for our clients.
postedCompany.name: LIBERTE HR SERVICES PTE. LTD.
